appDescription.message: Find duplicate, stale, new, and matching Chrome tabs, then close or jump to them quickly.
appDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome and the Chrome Web Store.

summary.description: Popup summary. {0} is total tabs. {1} is duplicate URL group count.

visibleResults.description: Results toolbar text. {0} is visible result count.

visibleResultsSelected.description: Results toolbar text. {0} is visible result count. {1} is selected count.

selectCount.description: Button label. {0} is number of visible tabs.

closeSelectedCount.description: Button label. {0} is number of selected tabs.

closeMatchingCount.description: Button label. {0} is number of matching tabs.

closeCount.description: Button label. {0} is number of tabs to close.

keepOneTitle.message: Close all but one tab in this group

tabsDuplicateUrl.description: Duplicate group metadata. {0} is tab count.

selectTab.description: Checkbox accessible label. {0} is tab title or URL.

viewedAge.description: Tab last-viewed label. {0} is a localized relative age.

couldNotCloseTabs.message: Could not close all selected tabs. {0}
couldNotCloseTabs.description: Error status. {0} is Chrome's error message.

couldNotActivateTab.description: Error status. {0} is Chrome's error message.

pageTextSearchNeedsAccess.message: Page-text search needs site access. Use Chrome's extension site access menu and allow CleanTabs on all sites.

searchingPageText.description: Status while searching page text. {0} is the user's query.

contentSearchStatusMatches.description: Search result status. {0} is matched tab count.

contentSearchStatusSkipped.description: Search result status. {0} is skipped tab count.

contentSearchStatusFailed.description: Search result status. {0} is failed tab count. {1} is the first error.
